name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: PM-KISAN provides annual income support of ₹6,000 to all landholding farmer families across India to meet farm input and domestic needs. Payments are made in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank accounts via DBT. Excludes institutional landholders, government employees, income-tax payers, and professionals.
benefit_details: ₹6,000 per year per family in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each, deposited every 4 months via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT). 100% Central Government funding. Maximum landholding: up to 2 hectares cultivable land.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: PMFBY provides financial support to farmers suffering crop losses due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases. Farmers pay a maximum 2% premium for Kharif crops and 1.5% for Rabi crops; the rest is subsidised by Central and State governments.
benefit_details: Claim covers difference between threshold yield and actual yield. Premium: Kharif max 2%, Rabi max 1.5%, commercial/horticultural max 5%. Claims via DBT based on Scale of Finance notified by States.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: PMKSY aims to expand cultivable area under assured irrigation and improve water-use efficiency through micro-irrigation (drip and sprinkler). Provides 55% subsidy for small and marginal farmers, 45% for others.
benefit_details: Subsidy of 55% for small/marginal farmers, 45% for others on drip/sprinkler systems. Per acre subsidy varies by crop and equipment.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare / Department of Financial Services
description: Kisan Credit Card provides timely credit to farmers for agricultural operations at concessional interest rates. Short-term credit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% per annum with 3% subvention for prompt repayment.
benefit_details: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% per annum. Prompt repayment brings effective rate to 4%. No collateral required up to ₹1.6 lakh. Revolving credit for 5 years.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides farmers with free soil testing and Soil Health Cards every two years containing nutrient status across 12 parameters and fertilizer recommendations.
benefit_details: Free soil testing and Soil Health Card every two years. Card contains 12-parameter nutrient status and crop-specific fertilizer guidance. No direct cash benefit.

name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Pan-India electronic trading portal connecting APMCs to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities. Enables transparent online trading and better price discovery. Free for registered farmers.
benefit_details: Free online trading platform across 1,000+ registered mandis. Transparent online bidding, direct payments to farmers, zero trading fee.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana — Gramin (PMAY-G)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Rural Development
description: Provides financial assistance to houseless rural poor for constructing pucca houses. Plain areas receive ₹1.20 lakh, hilly/difficult areas ₹1.30 lakh. Scheme extended to 2029 targeting 2 crore additional houses.
benefit_details: ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas; ₹1.30 lakh in hilly states. Additional ₹12,000 for toilet under Swachh Bharat. Up to 90 days MGNREGA wages (~₹20,000-₹25,000). DBT in 3-4 installments.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana — Urban (PMAY-U)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Provides housing assistance to urban EWS and LIG families. PMAY-U 2.0 launched 2024 provides ₹2.5 lakh central assistance for EWS beneficiaries under Beneficiary-Led Construction component.
benefit_details: Central assistance up to ₹2.5 lakh per EWS beneficiary. EWS income ≤ ₹3 lakh/year; LIG ₹3-6 lakh/year.

name: Ayushman Bharat — PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare / National Health Authority
description: World's largest public health insurance scheme providing ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization to 12+ crore poor families. All citizens 70+ get an additional ₹5 lakh top-up (Ayushman Vay Vandana).
benefit_details: ₹5 lakh/family/year cashless hospitalization at 27,000+ empanelled hospitals. Seniors 70+ get additional ₹5 lakh. No enrollment needed; auto-identified via SECC 2011.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Maternity benefit scheme providing cash incentives to pregnant women and lactating mothers. Provides ₹5,000 for the first child and ₹6,000 for the second child if a girl.
benefit_details: First child: ₹5,000 in two installments. Second child (girl only): ₹6,000 in one installment post-delivery. DBT to Aadhaar-linked bank account.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Promotes institutional delivery among poor pregnant women by providing cash incentives. Rural BPL women in Low Performing States receive ₹1,400 and urban BPL women ₹1,000 per delivery.
benefit_details: Rural BPL (LPS): ₹1,400; Urban BPL (LPS): ₹1,000. High Performing States: Rural ₹700, Urban ₹600. Paid at time of delivery in government facility.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance / Department of Posts
description: Small savings scheme for girl children providing 8.2% interest with tax benefits for education and marriage. Account opened in girl's name below 10 years, matures at 21 years.
benefit_details: 8.2% per annum interest compounded annually. Min ₹250/year, max ₹1.5 lakh/year. 50% partial withdrawal after girl turns 18 for education. Tax free under Sec 80C.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: National awareness and action campaign to prevent gender-biased sex selection and promote girl child survival, protection, and education. No direct individual cash transfer.
benefit_details: Awareness, community mobilization, and financial literacy programme. Financial benefit through convergence with Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Provides free LPG connections to adult women from BPL households. Deposit-free connection, free first refill, free cooking stove. In 2025-26, ₹300 subsidy per cylinder for up to 9 refills/year.
benefit_details: Deposit-free LPG connection including regulator, hose, consumer card, installation. First refill and stove free. ₹300/cylinder subsidy, up to 9 refills/year (max ₹2,700 annually) via DBT.

name: Mission Shakti
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Integrated women empowerment umbrella programme with SAMBAL (safety/security) and SAMARTHYA (empowerment) sub-schemes. Provides emergency shelter, legal aid, medical assistance, and skill training.
benefit_details: One Stop Centres (Sakhi): shelter, legal aid, medical aid, counselling. SHG formation and linkage. Services free of charge to women in distress.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Rural Development
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to adult rural household members willing to do unskilled manual work. AP and Telangana wage rate ₹300+/day for 2024-25.
benefit_details: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per household per year. AP/Telangana rate: ₹300/day. Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days. Weekly/fortnightly wages via bank accounts.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: End-to-end support to artisans of 18 traditional trades. Includes free skill training with ₹500/day stipend, ₹15,000 toolkit incentive, and collateral-free credit up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest.
benefit_details: Certificate + ID card. Basic training (₹500/day stipend). ₹15,000 toolkit via e-voucher. Loan Tranche 1: ₹1 lakh at 5%; Tranche 2: ₹2 lakh at 5%. Digital transaction incentive ₹1/transaction.

name: PM SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Collateral-free working capital loans to street vendors. Initial ₹10,000 loan, enhanced to ₹20,000 then ₹50,000 on timely repayment. 7% interest subvention on timely repayment.
benefit_details: Tranche 1: ₹10,000; Tranche 2: ₹20,000; Tranche 3: ₹50,000. 7% interest subvention quarterly. Digital cashback ₹50-₹100/month.
docs_required: Vendor ID / Certificate of Vending or ULB Recommendation

name: Stand Up India Scheme
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance
description: Facilitates bank loans of ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST and one woman borrower per bank branch for greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading.
benefit_details: Composite loan ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore. 7-year repayment, 18-month moratorium. One SC/ST and one woman beneficiary minimum per bank branch per year.

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance
description: Collateral-free micro loans to non-corporate micro enterprises. Three segments: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,001–₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5 lakh–₹10 lakh). TarunPlus up to ₹20 lakh for successful repayers.
benefit_details: Shishu: ₹50,000, zero processing fee. Kishor: ₹5 lakh. Tarun: ₹10 lakh. TarunPlus: ₹20 lakh. MUDRA card for revolving credit.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
description: ₹12,000/year scholarship to meritorious EWS students in Classes 9–12 in government schools to prevent dropout. Selected via state-level test in Class 8.
benefit_details: ₹12,000/year (₹1,000/month) via NSP to Aadhaar-linked accounts. Family income ≤ ₹3.5 lakh. 1 lakh scholarships nationally per year.

name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme — CAPF & AR Wards
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Home Affairs
description: Educational scholarships to wards and widows of CAPF and Indian Coast Guard personnel killed or disabled in action. ₹3,000/month for professional courses.
benefit_details: ₹3,000/month for wards in professional courses. Min 60% marks in Class 12 required. Up to 5 years duration. 2,000 fresh scholarships per year.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC Students
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs
description: Financial assistance to SC, ST, OBC students for post-matriculation education covering tuition fee and maintenance allowance. SC/ST income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh; OBC ≤ ₹1 lakh.
benefit_details: SC: Tuition fee ₹2,000–₹3,000/year + maintenance ₹550–₹1,200/month. OBC: Maintenance ₹300–₹570/month + tuition as applicable.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minorities/SC/ST
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Minority Affairs
description: Financial support to minority, SC, ST students in Classes 1–10 to prevent school dropout. Maintenance allowance and ad hoc grant. Income ceiling ₹1 lakh for minorities, ₹2 lakh for SC.
benefit_details: Minority (day scholar): ₹1,000–₹1,100/year; Hosteller: ₹2,600–₹3,500/year. SC (Classes 9-10): ₹225–₹525/month maintenance.

name: Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman (PM POSHAN)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
description: Free nutritious cooked meals every school working day to all children in government and government-aided schools Classes 1–8. Covers 11+ crore children across India.
benefit_details: Free hot meal every school day. Primary (1-5): 450 kcal + 12g protein. Upper Primary (6-8): 700 kcal + 20g protein. No cash transfer; direct meal at school.

name: National Fellowship for SC Students (NFSC)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Fellowships for SC candidates pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D degrees. JRF ₹31,000/month for first 2 years; SRF ₹35,000/month for years 3–5. 2,000 fellowships per year via UGC.
benefit_details: JRF: ₹31,000/month (years 1-2). SRF: ₹35,000/month (years 3-5). Annual contingency: Science ₹12,000 (JRF)/₹25,000 (SRF); Humanities ₹10,000/₹20,000. HRA as per UGC norms.

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
description: National Financial Inclusion mission providing zero-balance savings accounts to unbanked households. Includes RuPay debit card, ₹10,000 overdraft, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, and ₹30,000 life cover.
benefit_details: Zero-balance account + RuPay Debit Card. Overdraft up to ₹10,000 after 6 months. Accidental insurance ₹2 lakh. Life cover ₹30,000 via PMSBY/PMJJBY linkage. DBT enabled.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance / PFRDA
description: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 from age 60 to unorganized sector workers. Income tax payers excluded. Managed by PFRDA.
benefit_details: Guaranteed pension ₹1,000/₹2,000/₹3,000/₹4,000/₹5,000 at age 60. Monthly contribution varies by entry age. Spouse continues pension on subscriber's death.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance
description: One-year renewable term life insurance providing ₹2 lakh on death due to any cause. Annual premium ₹436, auto-debit from savings bank account. Available to bank account holders aged 18–50.
benefit_details: ₹2 lakh life cover on death from any cause. Annual premium ₹436. Auto-debit June 1. Coverage June 1 to May 31. No medical exam required.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Finance
description: One-year renewable personal accident insurance. ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total disability, ₹1 lakh for partial disability. Annual premium just ₹20. Available to bank account holders aged 18–70.
benefit_details: Accidental death/total disability: ₹2 lakh. Partial disability: ₹1 lakh. Annual premium ₹20. Auto-debit June 1. No medical exam.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Free food grain (5 kg wheat/rice per person per month) to all NFSA beneficiaries. Permanent scheme since January 2023 covering ~81.35 crore beneficiaries nationwide.
benefit_details: PHH: 5 kg/person/month free. AAY: 35 kg/household/month free. Distributed via Fair Price Shops under PDS.

name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
ministry_or_department: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Direct subsidies up to ₹78,000 for rooftop solar installation, enabling households to generate up to 300 free units/month. Launched February 2024 targeting 1 crore homes by March 2027.
benefit_details: 1 kW: ₹30,000; 2 kW: ₹60,000; 3 kW+: ₹78,000. Up to 300 units/month free. Additional ₹17,000–₹18,000/year from surplus power sold to DISCOM. DBT within 30 days.

name: PM-WANI (PM Wi-Fi Access Network Interface)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Communications / Department of Telecommunications
description: Enables affordable public Wi-Fi through a network of Public Data Offices (PDOs) in rural and semi-urban areas. Zero license/registration fees for small merchants setting up PDO hotspots.
benefit_details: Zero license fees for PDOs. Citizens get affordable broadband via registered hotspots. No fixed subsidy to end users; benefit is accessible low-cost internet.

name: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes (VCFSC)
ministry_or_department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / NSFDC
description: Concessional soft loans up to ₹15 lakh per SC entrepreneur at 4% per annum through scheduled banks and SFBs to promote SC entrepreneurship.
benefit_details: Soft loan up to ₹15 lakh at 4% per annum. 7-year repayment, 18-month moratorium. No collateral up to ₹10 lakh.

name: Telangana Rythu Bharosa Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana
description: Annual farm investment support to Telangana landowner farmers for seeds, fertilizers, and irrigation. Formerly Rythu Bandhu, relaunched January 2025 with ₹12,000 per acre per year paid in two seasonal DBT installments.
benefit_details: ₹6,000/acre/season (Kharif and Rabi), totalling ₹12,000/acre/year. DBT to farmer bank account. No cap on number of acres.

name: Rythu Bima (Farmers Group Life Insurance Scheme)
ministry_or_department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana / LIC of India
description: Government-funded group life insurance for Telangana farmers aged 18–59. On death from any cause, nominee receives ₹5 lakh within 10 days. Entire premium paid by state government to LIC.
benefit_details: ₹5,00,000 lump sum to nominee within 10 days of farmer's death (natural or accidental). Premium fully borne by Telangana government. Zero cost to farmer.

name: Kalyana Lakshmi Scheme
ministry_or_department: BC/SC/ST Development Departments, Government of Telangana
description: Marriage assistance scheme for brides from SC, ST, BC, and EBC Hindu communities. Provides ₹1,00,116 one-time grant via DBT to bride's bank account at time of marriage.
benefit_details: One-time grant of ₹1,00,116 transferred via DBT to bride's bank account at time of marriage.

name: Shaadi Mubarak Scheme
ministry_or_department: Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
description: Marriage assistance scheme for brides from Muslim and other minority communities. Provides ₹1,00,116 one-time financial grant via DBT to prevent child marriages and reduce financial burden.
benefit_details: One-time grant of ₹1,00,116 transferred directly to bride's bank account via DBT at time of marriage.

name: KCR Kit Scheme (MCH Kit)
ministry_or_department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
description: Provides pregnant women delivering at government hospitals with a kit of 16 essential baby care items and ₹12,000 financial assistance in three installments. Aims to reduce infant and maternal mortality.
benefit_details: ₹4,000 at registration + ₹4,000 at delivery + ₹4,000 at 6-week vaccination = ₹12,000 total. Additional ₹1,000 for girl child (₹13,000 total). Kit of 16 baby/mother care items (worth ~₹15,000).

name: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Rural Development, Government of Telangana / SERP
description: Government-promoted women's credit cooperative providing low-interest loans to SHG members for livelihood, micro-enterprise, health, education, and emergency needs. Disbursement within 48 hours.
benefit_details: Low/subsidised interest loans for livelihood and micro-enterprise. Loan amount varies by SHG grading. 48-hour disbursement. No processing fee.

name: Dalit Bandhu Scheme
ministry_or_department: Scheduled Castes Development Department, Government of Telangana
description: One-time capital grant of ₹10 lakh to SC families to start income-generating businesses. 100% grant — not a loan — no bank guarantee or repayment required.
benefit_details: ₹10,00,000 one-time capital 100% grant/subsidy. No bank loan linkage, no collateral, no repayment. Beneficiary chooses business from approved list.

name: T-PRIDE (Telangana State Programme for Rapid Incubation of Dalit Entrepreneurs)
ministry_or_department: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Telangana
description: Fiscal incentives for SC/ST entrepreneurs setting up new enterprises. Benefits include 35–45% investment subsidy, 7% interest subsidy, power cost reimbursement, land rebate, and SGST reimbursement.
benefit_details: 35% investment subsidy (45% for women). 7% interest subsidy. ₹2/unit power cost reimbursement for 5–7 years. 50% land cost rebate. 100% stamp duty reimbursement. SGST reimbursement 5–7 years.

name: Aasara Pension Scheme
ministry_or_department: Panchayati Raj and Rural Development Department, Government of Telangana
description: Social security pension for elderly (57+), widows, single women, disabled persons, weavers, toddy tappers, beedi workers, and HIV/AIDS patients. As of February 2025: old age/widows ₹4,000/month, disabled ₹6,000/month.
benefit_details: Old Age (57+)/Widow/Single Women/Weavers/Toddy Tappers/HIV patients: ₹4,000/month. Disabled (60%+ SADAREM): ₹6,000/month. Paid 1st–7th of every month via biometric authentication.

name: Indiramma Indlu Housing Scheme
ministry_or_department: Housing Department, Government of Telangana
description: Financial assistance for homeless/landless poor families to construct pucca houses. ₹5 lakh (₹6 lakh for SC/ST). Government also provides free land to landless families. Replaced 2BHK Housing Scheme.
benefit_details: General: ₹5,00,000; SC/ST: ₹6,00,000 via DBT in 4 stages. Landless families also receive free housing site. Minimum 400 sq ft with RCC roof, kitchen, toilet.

name: Gruha Jyothi Scheme
ministry_or_department: Energy Department / State Power DISCOMs, Government of Telangana
description: Free electricity up to 200 units per month to domestic households holding white ration cards. Households consuming ≤200 units pay zero electricity bill.
benefit_details: Zero electricity bill for households consuming ≤200 units/month. Government bears full cost. Consumption above 200 units charged at normal tariff. ~5.1 crore households benefited as of early 2025.

name: Telangana ePASS Fee Reimbursement Scheme
ministry_or_department: Welfare Departments (SC/ST/BC/Minorities), Government of Telangana
description: Scholarship and fee reimbursement for SC, ST, BC, EBC, Minority, and Disabled students in post-matric education. Full tuition fee reimbursement at government-approved institutions.
benefit_details: Full tuition fee reimbursement (Intermediate to PG/Medical). SC/ST: family income ≤₹2 lakh; BC/EBC/Disabled: ≤₹1 lakh. Personal scholarship ₹4,000–₹5,000/year. ₹929 crore disbursed to 7.2 lakh students in 2024–25.

name: Telangana Gurukul Residential Schools
ministry_or_department: Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Societies, Government of Telangana
description: Free quality residential education to SC, ST, BC, Minority, EBC students from Class 5 to Class 12. Run by TSWREIS (SC), TTWREIS (ST), MJPTBCWREIS (BC), TMREIS (Minority). Free boarding, meals, uniforms, books.
benefit_details: Free residential education Classes 5–12. Free boarding, meals, uniforms, books, coaching. No fees charged.

name: Ambedkar Overseas Vidya Nidhi Scholarship (Telangana)
ministry_or_department: Scheduled Castes Development / Backward Classes Welfare, Government of Telangana
description: Scholarship for SC/ST students to pursue higher education abroad. Covers tuition fees, living expenses, visa fees, and one-way air ticket up to ₹20 lakh.
benefit_details: Up to ₹20,00,000 for tuition and living expenses (as per admission letter or ₹20 lakh, whichever lower). One-way economy air ticket and visa fees included. One student per family. Selection based on merit.

name: Indiramma Atmiya Bharosa Scheme
ministry_or_department: Revenue Department, Government of Telangana
description: Financial assistance to families of deceased Aasara pension beneficiaries and extremely distressed poor families. Provides one-time or periodic emergency financial relief to prevent destitution.
benefit_details: Direct emergency financial/livelihood support during extreme family crises. Ad-hoc emergency allocations to protect families from destitution.

name: Annadata Sukhibhava Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP Super Six flagship scheme providing ₹20,000 per year financial assistance to farmers. Renamed from YSR Rythu Bharosa by TDP-NDA government. Launched August 2, 2025. Farmers receive ₹6,000 Central (PM-KISAN) + ₹14,000 State contribution = ₹20,000 total.
benefit_details: ₹20,000 per year per farmer (₹6,000 Central + ₹14,000 State) in three installments via DBT. Additional seeds, fertilizers, and crop disaster compensation. First installment deposited August 2, 2025.

name: NTR Bharosa Pension Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Monthly social security pension for elderly, widows, single women, disabled, weavers, toddy tappers, fishermen, cobblers, and transgender persons in AP. Renamed from YSR Pension Kanuka. Pension increased from ₹3,000 to ₹4,000/month.
benefit_details: Old Age/Widow/Single Women/Weavers/Toddy Tappers/Fishermen/Cobblers/Transgender: ₹4,000/month. Disabled: ₹15,000/month for severely disabled. Rural income ≤₹10,000/month; Urban income ≤₹12,000/month.
docs_required: Category-specific proof (disability certificate, death certificate for widow, etc.)

name: Thalliki Vandanam Scheme (Mother's Salute)
ministry_or_department: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP Super Six flagship education scheme providing ₹15,000 annually per school-going child to mothers/guardians of children enrolled from Class 1 to Intermediate (Class 12) in government and aided schools. Launched January 2025, replacing YSR Amma Vodi. Covers 70+ lakh students and 43+ lakh mothers.
benefit_details: ₹15,000/year per child credited directly to mother's/guardian's bank account. Covers all children Class 1 to Intermediate in government, government-aided, and private unaided schools. Minimum 75% child attendance required. Budget: ₹9,400+ crore annually.

name: Aadabidda Nidhi Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP Super Six scheme providing ₹1,500 monthly financial assistance to economically weaker women aged 18–59 years. Promotes financial independence for women from poor families.
benefit_details: ₹1,500/month transferred directly to beneficiary's bank account. Aimed at reducing women's financial dependency on family members.

name: APSRTC Free Bus Travel for Women (Stree Shakti)
ministry_or_department: Transport Department / APSRTC, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP Super Six scheme providing free travel on all APSRTC buses for all women, girls, and transgender individuals within Andhra Pradesh state boundaries. Launched August 15, 2025.
benefit_details: Free travel on all APSRTC buses within AP state boundaries for all women and transgender individuals. No income restriction. Covers approximately 90+ lakh women daily.

name: AP Free LPG Cylinders Scheme (3 Free Gas Cylinders)
ministry_or_department: Civil Supplies Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP Super Six scheme providing 3 free LPG gas cylinders per year to women-headed households across AP. Covers approximately 90 lakh households. Complements the central PMUY scheme.
benefit_details: 3 free LPG cylinders per year per household. Benefit delivered to women-headed households via DBT coordination with oil marketing companies.

name: NTR Housing Scheme
ministry_or_department: Housing Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP government housing scheme providing financial assistance up to ₹2.50 lakh to EWS/BPL families to construct new pucca houses or complete existing structures. Runs in coordination with PMAY-G. Digitally monitored via AP Housing Management System (APHMS). Target: 7 lakh units.
benefit_details: Financial assistance up to ₹2.50 lakh per EWS/BPL beneficiary. Payments via DBT in stages based on construction progress. All transactions monitored via APHMS portal.

name: NTR Suraksha (AP Health and Life Insurance Scheme)
ministry_or_department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Comprehensive health and life insurance scheme covering ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization plus ₹5 lakh for accidental death and disability. Fully government-funded, no premium. Implemented in convergence with Ayushman Bharat PMJAY. Continued and rebranded under TDP-NDA from Aarogyasri.
benefit_details: ₹5 lakh/family/year secondary and tertiary hospitalization. ₹5 lakh accidental death/permanent disability cover. ₹2.5 lakh partial disability cover. Auto-enrolled for AP families with annual income < ₹5 lakh. Cashless treatment at all network hospitals.

name: Chandranna Pelli Kanuka Scheme
ministry_or_department: Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,00,000 for inter-caste marriages to reduce social discrimination. Bride must belong to SC/ST/BC/Minority/Disabled communities. Renamed from YSR Kalyanamasthhu scheme by TDP-NDA government.
benefit_details: ₹1,00,000 financial assistance for inter-caste marriage directly to bride's bank account. Bride and groom must be 18+ and 21+ respectively. Both must have passed Class 10.
docs_required: Aadhaar Card of bride and groom

name: Shaadi Tohfa Scheme (AP Minority Marriage Assistance)
ministry_or_department: Department of Minority Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Financial assistance for marriage of girls from Muslim and other minority communities in AP. Provides ₹75,000 one-time grant to eligible minority brides. Renamed from YSR Shaadi Tohfa by TDP-NDA government.
benefit_details: ₹75,000 one-time grant to minority community brides at time of marriage via DBT. Bride must be 18+ and groom 21+ years of age.

name: AP Nirudyoga Bruthi (Unemployment Allowance Scheme)
ministry_or_department: Department of Employment and Training, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Monthly unemployment allowance to educated unemployed citizens in AP. Provides ₹3,00,000/year equivalent or ₹3,000/month to registered unemployed youth while they seek employment. TDP government revived this commitment.
benefit_details: ₹3,000/month directly to beneficiary bank account. Available while registered as unemployed. Must be actively seeking employment.

name: NTR Vidyonnathi Scheme (Free UPSC/Civil Services Coaching)
ministry_or_department: Department of Social Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Free coaching for UPSC, APPSC, and Group examinations to students from economically weaker sections. Provides ₹10,000 for books, stationery, and lodging in installments. Renamed from YSR Vidyonnathi.
benefit_details: ₹10,000 in installments for books, stationery, and lodging expenses. Free coaching at empanelled institutes for UPSC/APPSC/Group exams.

name: Nethanna Bharosa Scheme (Handloom Weavers Support)
ministry_or_department: Department of Handlooms and Textiles, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Support scheme for handloom weavers in AP providing ₹25,000 annual financial assistance per handloom family, free electricity, GST reimbursement, new handloom cluster development, and market linkage support.
benefit_details: ₹25,000/year per handloom family. Free electricity for handloom operations. GST reimbursement. New handloom clusters and market linkage support.
docs_required: Weaver ID Card / Cooperative Society Membership

name: AP Chandranna Bima Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Finance, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Government-sponsored group insurance scheme for AP residents providing accident insurance cover. Originally launched October 2, 2016. Covers accidental death and disability for BPL and other eligible families.
benefit_details: Accidental death/total disability: ₹5 lakh. Partial disability: ₹2.5 lakh. Premium fully borne by AP state government. Cashless treatment at network hospitals.

name: Kanti Velugu Scheme (Eye Care Programme)
ministry_or_department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Universal eye care programme providing free eye testing, free spectacles, and free eye surgeries to all AP residents. Includes school children and adults. Budget of ₹560 crore allocated. Multi-phase programme.
benefit_details: Free comprehensive eye testing. Free spectacles to those with refractive errors. Free eye surgeries (cataract, etc.) at government hospitals. Covers all AP residents regardless of income.
docs_required: AP Ration Card (for free services priority)

name: AP Fee Reimbursement Scheme (Jagananna Vidya Deevena / AP Fee Reimbursement)
ministry_or_department: Department of Higher Education, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Full tuition fee reimbursement for SC, ST, BC, EBC, Minority students pursuing higher education in AP. Covers degree, engineering, medical, PG courses. Continued under TDP-NDA government though scheme name under review.
benefit_details: Full tuition fee reimbursement for approved courses. SC/ST: family income ≤₹2.5 lakh. BC/EBC/Minority: income ≤₹1.5 lakh. Direct credit to student's bank account.

name: AP Post Matric Hostels for SC/ST/BC Students
ministry_or_department: Department of Social Welfare / Tribal Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Free residential hostel facilities for SC, ST, BC, Minority students pursuing post-matriculation education in AP. Provides free accommodation, meals, and study materials. Run by respective welfare departments.
benefit_details: Free accommodation, meals, study materials, and utilities for SC/ST/BC/Minority students in government welfare hostels during college study.

name: Adarana 3.0 Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Welfare scheme for toddy tappers, artisans, and workers from BC, SC, ST, Minority, and BPL families. Provides free moped two-wheelers to toddy tappers and advanced palm-tree climbing equipment to make their work safer and more productive.
benefit_details: Free moped two-wheelers to registered toddy tappers. Advanced palm-tree climbing equipment provided. Benefits targeted at BC, SC, ST, Minority, and BPL occupation groups.

name: AP SC Corporation Loans (Ambedkar Loan Scheme)
ministry_or_department: AP State Finance Corporation for SCs / Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Subsidized loans to SC individuals and families in AP for self-employment, education, housing, agriculture, and business. Concessional interest rates ranging from 3–6% per annum through the AP SC Corporation.
benefit_details: Loans at 3–6% concessional interest for self-employment, education, and housing. Loan amount varies by purpose. No collateral for small loans. Repayment period 3–7 years.

name: AP ST Corporation Tribal Welfare Loans
ministry_or_department: Department of Tribal Welfare / AP Tribal Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Society, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Subsidized loan and grant support for ST individuals in AP for agricultural development, small business, housing, and skill training. Administered through AP Tribal Welfare Department.
benefit_details: Concessional loans at 3–5% interest for agriculture, housing, and small business. Skill training and educational grants for tribal youth. ITDA-linked benefits in scheduled areas.

name: AP Free Electricity to Farmers Scheme
ministry_or_department: Energy Department / DISCOMS, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Free electricity supply to registered agricultural consumers in AP for pump sets and irrigation. Farmers with valid agricultural electricity connection get free power for agricultural operations. Long-standing policy continued under TDP-NDA.
benefit_details: Free electricity for agricultural pump sets up to 9 hours per day. Farmer must have valid AP agricultural electricity connection. No misuse for commercial purposes permitted.

name: AP MSME ReSTART Capital Subsidy Scheme
ministry_or_department: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Financial incentives and capital subsidy for MSME entrepreneurs in AP including investment subsidy, interest subsidy, power cost reimbursement, and SGST reimbursement. Part of AP Industrial Development Policy 2023-27.
benefit_details: Investment subsidy up to 25% on fixed assets. Interest subsidy up to 5% on term loans for 5 years. Power cost reimbursement ₹1.50/unit for 5 years. 100% SGST reimbursement for 5–7 years.

name: Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Vidyarthi Mitra Kits
ministry_or_department: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Free educational kits to students in AP government schools. Includes school bags, notebooks, stationery, uniforms, and study materials. Distributed at start of academic year to reduce financial burden on poor families.
benefit_details: Free school bag, notebooks, stationery, uniforms, and study materials per student per year. Provided at start of each academic year to all eligible government school students.

name: AP Driver Welfare Scheme
ministry_or_department: Transport Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Launched September 13, 2025 (G.O. Ms. No. 33) to help auto-rickshaw, taxi, and goods vehicle drivers meet expenses like insurance, vehicle fitness certificate, repairs, and incidental costs. Financial assistance to registered drivers.
benefit_details: Financial assistance to eligible drivers for insurance premiums, vehicle fitness certificate renewal, and emergency repairs. Exact amount per driver determined by G.O. Ms. No. 33 dated September 13, 2025.

name: Jagananna Thodu (Interest-Free Working Capital for Street Vendors)
ministry_or_department: Department of Municipal Administration, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Interest-free working capital loan of ₹10,000 per year to street vendors, small traders, and micro-entrepreneurs in AP to support their livelihoods. Note: This YSRCP-era scheme is under review by TDP-NDA government; status confirmed active as of early 2025.
benefit_details: ₹10,000 interest-free working capital loan per year. No collateral. Direct credit to bank account.

name: AP Micro Irrigation Scheme (APFMIS / State Component)
ministry_or_department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: AP-specific micro irrigation subsidy scheme providing subsidized drip and sprinkler systems to AP farmers, supplementing the central PMKSY. Helps farmers access water efficiently and reduce input costs.
benefit_details: Additional state subsidy on top of PMKSY central subsidy for drip/sprinkler systems. Subsidized borewells and micro-irrigation for small/marginal farmers. Support through Rythu Bharosa Kendras (RBKs).

name: AP Aarogyasri Community Health Insurance (Continued)
ministry_or_department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department / Aarogyasri Health Care Trust, Government of Andhra Pradesh
description: Continuing AP Aarogyasri scheme providing cashless secondary and tertiary healthcare at network hospitals for BPL/white ration card families in AP. Now enhanced under NTR Suraksha branding. Covers 1,057+ medical procedures.
benefit_details: Cashless treatment for 1,057+ medical procedures at 300+ network hospitals. No premium. BPL/White ration card families auto-enrolled. Covers hospitalizations over ₹1,000.
docs_required: AP White Ration Card / SECC listed
